```plaintext
function checkStringForAlphanumeric(input):
    // Initialize flags for checking presence of alphanumeric characters
    hasSpecialChars := false
    
    // Iterate through each character in the input string
    for i from 1 to length of input do:
        char := substring of input starting at index i - 1 ending before next character
        
        // Check if the current character is not alphanumeric
        if char is not letter or digit:
            hasSpecialChars := true
            
            // Break out of loop early if found first special character
            break
    
    // If no special characters were found, output "Only Alphanumeric"
    if not hasSpecialChars:
        output "Only Alphanumeric"
        
    else:
        output "Contains Special Characters"
```
